name: JALCO Holdings Inc.
summary: JALCO Holdings Inc. engages in real estate leasing and loan management businesses. The company provides management, accounting, general affair, and legal affair services, as well as merger and acquisition services. It is also involved in money lending; equipment engineering; and conservation and responsibilities businesses. In addition, the company engages in the manufacture and sale of electronic equipment, medieval travel technology machines, and equipment machines; and provides information processing machines and terminal equipment, other electronic equipment, and communication devices. JALCO Holdings Inc. was founded in 1956 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
